_comment: WARNING: This egg was originally generated by the Pterodactyl Panel but has been manually modified. It now uses a CMake-based build system supporting C, C++ and C# projects. Do not modify unless you understand build configuration, toolchains, and runtime execution behavior.
name: Generic CMake (C / C++ / C#)
author: itzzmateo@devflare.de
description: A generic CMake-based egg that builds and runs C, C++ and C# projects.
startup: if [[ -d .git ]] && [[ "{{AUTO_UPDATE}}" == "1" ]]; then git pull; fi; mkdir -p build; cd build; cmake ..; cmake --build .; ./{{EXECUTABLE_NAME}}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

apt update
apt install -y git curl jq file unzip build-essential cmake clang mono-complete

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

if [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "true" ] || [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "1" ]; then
    echo "user upload mode enabled"
    exit 0
fi

if [[ ${GIT_ADDRESS} != *.git ]]; then
    GIT_ADDRESS=${GIT_ADDRESS}.git
fi

if [ -z "${USERNAME}" ] && [ -z "${ACCESS_TOKEN}" ]; then
    echo "using anonymous git clone"
else
    GIT_ADDRESS="https://${USERNAME}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo -e ${GIT_ADDRESS} | cut -d/ -f3-)"
fi

if [ "$(ls -A /mnt/server)" ]; then
    echo "/mnt/server not empty"

    if [ -d .git ]; then
        if [ -f .git/config ]; then
            ORIGIN=$(git config --get remote.origin.url)
        else
            exit 10
        fi
    fi

    if [ "${ORIGIN}" == "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
        git pull
    fi
else
    echo "cloning repository"

    if [ -z ${BRANCH} ]; then
        git clone ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
    else
        git clone --single-branch --branch ${BRANCH} ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
    fi
fi

echo "Installation completed"

variables.name: User Uploaded Files
variables.description: Skip install if user uploads files (0 = false, 1 = true)

variables.name: Executable Name
variables.description: Name of the compiled output binary (from CMake target)
